item.name: Authentication

request.description: Register a new user account. Returns OTP code for verification (1234 in testing environment).

response.name: Register

request.description: Verify OTP code sent during registration. This endpoint is used for password reset flow. For registration verification, use the same endpoint but it will log the user in.
Login using mobile and password. Returns user data and authentication token.

response.name: Login

formdata.description: Oman mobile number registered in the system

request.description: Request password reset. Sends a 4-digit OTP to the mobile number (1234 in testing). Has 60-second cooldown between requests.

formdata.description: Mobile number used in forgot password

request.description: Verify OTP code for password reset. Returns a temporary token to be used in reset password endpoint.

formdata.description: Temporary token received from verify OTP endpoint

request.description: Reset password using the temporary token received from verify OTP endpoint.

formdata.description: Mobile number to resend OTP to

request.description: Resend OTP code. Can only be used if the last OTP was sent more than 60 seconds ago.
Logout the authenticated user. Requires authentication token.

response.name: Logout

request.description: Change password for authenticated user. Requires current password.

response.name: Change Password

request.description: Get authenticated user's profile information.
Delete authenticated user's account permanently.

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, password management, and OTP verification

item.name: Products

request.description: Get full product details by ID. Returns ProductResource with all product information including images, sizes, brand, and pricing.

response.name: Show Product By ID

request.description: Get all products belonging to the رذاذ (Rathath) brand. Returns ProductCardResource collection with card view information.

response.name: Products of Brand رذاذ (Rathath)

request.description: Get all products belonging to the برد (Bard) brand. Returns ProductCardResource collection with card view information.

response.name: Products of Brand برد (Bard)
Products of Brand برد (Bard)

request.description: Get all products belonging to the برد (Bard) brand. Returns ProductCardResource collection with card view information.

response.name: most sold products
rathath sizes
barad sizes
barad sizes Copy

item.description: Product endpoints for retrieving product information

formdata.description: Product Size ID (optional, uses size price if provided)

request.description: Add a product to cart. Supports size-based pricing. Requires authentication or guest UUID header.

response.name: Add to Cart

formdata.description: Product Size ID (optional, uses size price if provided)

request.description: Get current cart with items and summary. Optional coupon code can be passed as query parameter.

response.name: Get Cart

request.description: Update cart item quantity. Set quantity to 0 to remove item.

response.name: Update Cart

request.description: Get total number of items in cart.

response.name: Cart Count

request.description: Set delivery address for cart. Requires authentication.

response.name: Set Cart Address

request.description: Apply coupon code to cart. Requires authentication.

response.name: Apply Coupon

request.description: Checkout and create order. Supports 'online' (Moyassar payment) and 'points' payment methods. For points payment, validates user has sufficient points and deducts them immediately. For online payment, returns payment URL.

response.name: Checkout

request.description: Check if user has enough points to checkout with points payment. Returns user_points, cart_total_points, and eligible boolean.

response.name: Check Points Eligibility

request.description: Get user's orders. Optional status filter: 'current' or 'previous'.

response.name: My Orders

request.description: Get order details by ID.
Cancel an order. Only allowed for orders with status 'New' or 'Preparing'.
Download order invoice PDF.

response.name: Download Invoice
get orders invoices

request.description: Get all unfinished orders for the authenticated user (not paid or not delivered). Returns array of { order_id, items: [{ product_name, image, quantity, price }], total, created_at }.

response.name: Get Unfinished Orders

item.name: Packages & Subscriptions

request.description: Return brands that have packages. Use this list to show package options per brand.

response.name: Available Brands

request.description: Get packages for a brand. Returns PackageResource collection with package details and available bottle sizes.

response.name: Packages By Brand

formdata.description: Delivery address ID (must belong to user)

request.description: Create a pending subscription and initiate Moyassar payment. Returns payment_url to redirect user. On success callback subscription is activated.

response.name: Subscribe To Package

formdata.description: Delivery address ID (must belong to user)

request.description: Get current user's subscription (latest). Returns package details, start_date, end_date, days_remaining, is_active.

item.description: Packages and subscription endpoints. POST requests use form-data body.

item.name: Donations

request.description: Get all donation sliders. Returns DonationSliderResource collection.

response.name: Get Donation Sliders

request.description: Get all donation destinations. Returns DonationDestinationResource collection.

response.name: Get Donation Destinations

request.description: Get all donation types with prices. Returns DonationTypeResource collection.

response.name: Get Donation Types

request.description: Add a donation item to cart. Form-data: donation_type_id, donation_destination_id, quantity (optional).

response.name: Add Donation to Cart

request.description: Checkout with donation cart items only. No address. Returns donation_id, payment_url (online) or success (points).

response.name: Donation Checkout

request.description: List paid donations for the authenticated user. Returns DonationResource collection.

response.name: My Donations

item.description: Donation sliders, destinations, types, cart donation items, checkout (no address), and my donations. POST use form-data.

item.name: Institution & Partnerships

request.description: Get all institution types. Returns InstitutionTypeResource collection (id, name in current locale).

response.name: Get Institution Types

request.description: Submit a business partnership. Body: form-data with name, mobile, institution_type_id, company_name, number_of_employees. Returns standard success response.

response.name: Create Business Partnership

item.description: Institution types and business partnership submission. POST uses form-data.

item.name: Health Education

request.description: Subscribe email to health education newsletter. Returns success response. Validation: email required, email format, unique in health_education_newsletters.

response.name: Subscribe to Newsletter

request.description: Returns latest daily advices (Q&A). Sorted by latest. Returns DailyAdviceResource collection. Uses current locale for question/answer.

response.name: Get Daily Advices

request.description: Returns how to win points title and description for current locale. Response: { "title": "...", "description": "..." }.
Combined health home endpoint. Returns: how_to_win_points (title, description, image), daily_advices (image, latest_advice), water_challenge (image). Uses current locale.

response.name: Get Health Home

item.description: Health Education newsletter, daily advices, how to win points, and combined health home endpoints.

request.description: List user's challenges with optional status filter. Paginated. Returns meta (current_page, last_page, per_page, total).
Get one challenge by ID. Policy: must own the challenge.
Update challenge (e.g. daily goal, reminders). Use reminder id to update existing, omit id to add new.
Cancel challenge (sets status to cancelled).

item.description: Create, get current, list, show, update, cancel challenges.

query.description: Optional - latitude for near_point_of_sales (or from user default address)

request.description: Home feed. Returns: sliders, my_subscription (nullable), my_points (nullable), most_sold_products, near_point_of_sales (limit 3), smart_consumer_categories, unfinished_order (nullable). When authenticated, my_subscription and my_points reflect user data; near_point_of_sales sorted by distance if lat/long available. Legacy keys (home_sliders, about_us, categories, etc.) included for backward compatibility.

Legacy keys (home_sliders, about_us, categories, etc.) included for backward compatibility.
